en.extract:
The brown parisoma or brown warbler (Curruca lugens) is an Old World warbler of the family Sylviidae found in eastern Africa.

The '''brown parisoma''' or '''brown warbler''' ('''''Curruca lugens''''') is an [[Old World warbler]] of the family [[Sylviidae]] found in eastern Africa.
